Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Independent Guilds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The capacity of the Independent Guilds to organize depends on the Consultants.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — The Witnesses might support an alliance against the Independent Guilds.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — The Independent Guilds are gathered outside the main door of the Rose Tower.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Regents want the Independent Guilds to speak with one voice voluntarily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Independent Guilds are not loved in the heart of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The burden of making unification or mutual defense efforts falls on the Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — The Independent Guilds have already retreated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The Independent Guilds killed Baldezar Kern.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
